Welcome to Lester's Place

Who We Are
Welcome to Lester’s Place, where we provide a safe haven for individuals facing diverse challenges, offering support and resources to guide them toward stability and renewal.

Experience Comfort and Support at Lester’s Place

Step into Lester’s Place and experience a haven of peace and warmth. Each room exuded coziness, furnished with care to provide the utmost comfort. Plush sofas invited you to sink in, while clean, inviting beds promised a restful night’s sleep.

Lester’s Place exceeds expectations by addressing modern needs. We provide complimentary WiFi, ensuring residents stay connected with the world beyond our walls. Committed to wellness, our environment strictly prohibits drugs and alcohol, fostering a supportive space for those journeying toward recovery.

Read More
Our Mission

At Lester’s Place, our mission is to empower individuals to overcome a variety of challenges, including domestic violence, substance abuse, mental health issues, homelessness, eviction, and medical debt. We provide personalized services tailored to each resident’s housing needs, ensuring they receive the support and resources necessary to achieve stability and renewal.

Our Approach
Our dedicated team of professionals collaborates to create holistic treatment plans, fostering healing, growth, and self-sufficiency. Through compassion, empowerment, community support, and respect for individual dignity, we help our residents rebuild their lives and realize their potential.
Our Impact
Since our establishment, Lester’s Place has been a beacon of hope, witnessing countless transformations as individuals emerge stronger and more resilient. Through our housing programs, we’ve helped individuals reclaim control of their lives, offering them a pathway to a brighter future.
Ready to Get Started With Us?
